data.name: crunch (on stability ball, arms straight)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie back on the ball until your lower back is supported and your upper body is parallel to the floor.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ball, curling your shoulders towards your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: crunch floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: curl-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: curtsey squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg.
Step:3 Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground.
Step:4 Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot.
Step:5 Push through your front foot to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping diagonally behind and across your body with your left foot.

data.name: cycle cross trainer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the cycle cross trainer.
Step:2 Place your feet on the pedals and grip the handlebars.
Step:3 Start pedaling in a smooth and controlled motion.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and increase the resistance if desired.
Step:5 Continue pedaling for the desired duration of your cardio workout.

data.name: dead bug
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: decline crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: decline push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: decline sit-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the bench, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: deep push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: deep smith machine reverse decline close grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in. Focus on deep movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: diamond push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: drop push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternate biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

data.name: dumbbell alternate biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place the arm blaster on your upper arms, ensuring a secure fit.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with the opposite arm.
Step:8 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternate hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternate preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the pad of the preacher bench, allowing your arms to fully extend.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand as you contract your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to curl the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternate seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended down.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm.
Step:7 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternate side press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other dumbbell at shoulder height.
Step:3 Lower the pressed dumbbell back to shoulder height while pressing the other dumbbell overhead.
Step:4 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternating bicep curl with leg raised on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball behind you and position one foot on top of it, keeping your balance.
Step:3 With your arms fully extended and elbows close to your sides, curl one dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell alternating seated bicep curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl one dumbbell while rotating your forearm until your palm is facing your shoulder.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the curl with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating curls for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell arnold press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell arnold press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell around pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell around pullover - intensive variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet firmly on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest. Perform with intensive intensity.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head in an arc motion.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell bench seated press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell bench squat
instructions: Step:1 Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:4 Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell bicep curl lunge with bowling motion
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, bending your right knee and lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 At the bottom of the lunge, rotate your torso to the right, as if you were bowling a ball.
Step:5 Reverse the motion, stepping back with your right foot and returning to the starting position while lowering the dumbbells back down.
Step:6 Repeat the lunge and curl motion, this time rotating your torso to the left.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell bicep curl on exercise ball with leg raised
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 While performing the bicep curl, raise one leg off the ground and hold it in the air for the duration of the exercise.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

data.name: dumbbell bicep curl with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

data.name: dumbbell biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell biceps curl reverse
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell biceps curl squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell biceps curl v sit on bosu ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bosu ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward and your arms fully extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell burpee
instructions: Step:1 Start in a standing position with your feet shoulder-width apart and a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, placing the dumbbells on the ground in front of you.
Step:3 Kick your feet back into a push-up position, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Perform a push-up, bending your elbows and lowering your chest towards the ground.
Step:5 Jump your feet back towards your hands, landing in a squat position.
Step:6 Stand up explosively, lifting the dumbbells off the ground and bringing them to your shoulders.
Step:7 Press the dumbbells overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Lower the dumbbells back to your shoulders and repeat the entire sequence for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell clean
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Explosively extend your hips and knees, driving through your heels to jump off the ground.
Step:4 As you jump, shrug your shoulders and pull the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping them close to your body.
Step:5 Catch the dumbbells at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing forward and your palms facing up.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell close grip press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Step:3 Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Step:4 As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
Step:5 As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells.
Step:6 After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell close-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Step:3 Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Step:4 As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
Step:5 As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh.
Step:2 Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell contralateral forward lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell cross body hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell cross body hammer curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells as close to your opposite shoulder as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell cuban press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell cuban press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline one arm fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward.
Step:4 As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell decline one arm hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell decline shrug
instructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline shrug - rigid variation
instructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 (rigid variation) Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your arms fully extended towards the floor.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline shrug v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Set up a decline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting on it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your arms straight, raise your shoulders as high as possible while squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Hold the contraction for a brief pause, then lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline twist fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Step:5 Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell finger curls
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh, palm facing up.
Step:3 Allow the dumbbell to roll down to your fingertips, then curl it back up by flexing your fingers.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

data.name: dumbbell fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported by the ball.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your elbows slightly and lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and squeeze your chest muscles as you bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell forward lunge triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

data.name: dumbbell front raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell front raise v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell full can lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell goblet squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell hammer curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell hammer curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell hammer curl with traditional
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions. Focus on traditional movement.

data.name: dumbbell hammer curls (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, while holding your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell high curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline alternate press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Once at shoulder height, rotate your wrists so that the palms of your hands are facing forward.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells up with your chest and shoulders, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, alternating arms.

data.name: dumbbell incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline breeding
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Start with your arms fully extended, perpendicular to the ground.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline fly
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the incline bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline hammer press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells up and slightly inward, keeping your palms facing each other.
Step:5 Extend your arms fully, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline inner biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm hammer press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing inward and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, straightening your arm.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball modified
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position. Emphasize modified control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell incline one arm press on exercise ball with extended
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand, feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball. Perform with extended intensity.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder height with your palm facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell incline palm-in press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench.
Step:4 Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other.
Step:5 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling your body down the ball until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and pointing out to the sides.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Keeping your back against the bench, exhale and raise the dumbbells above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline shoulder raise
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest the dumbbells on your thighs and lean back onto the bench.
Step:3 Use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Exhale and slowly raise the dumbbells above your head, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
